title: The four seasonal Marian antiphons (data/texts/marianAntiphons.json)
description: The seasonal antiphon said at the end of Compline: Alma Redemptoris Mater (Advent through Feb 1), Ave Regina Caelorum (Feb 2 through Holy Saturday), Regina Caeli (Easter season), Salve Regina (the rest of the year). See src/complineAntiphon.ts and SOURCES.md - all four are 'verified': false pending a source with clearer licensing than the one used to populate this file.
